Welcome
to Tonkeeper
World-class speed
Thanks to the unique architecture of The Open Network, TON transactions are settled in seconds.
End-to-end security
Tonkeeper stores your cryptographic keys on your device. All trades are executed via decentralized protocols so that your crytpo never ends up in the hands of centraliezd exchanges.
Get started

Add Wallet

Create a new wallet or add
an existing one

Create a new wallet
Existing Wallet
Import wallet with a 24 secret words
Enter your
recovery phrase
To restore access to your wallet, enter the 24 secret recovery words given to you when you created your wallet.
